member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.QuantityMeasurementController
member.summary:
UC17: REST controller for all quantity measurement operations. All endpoints require a valid JWT Bearer token. Base URL: /api/v1/quantities
POST /compare → Compare two quantities POST /convert → Convert to different unit POST /add → Add two quantities POST /subtract → Subtract quantities POST /divide → Divide (returns SCALAR ratio) GET /history/operation/{opType} → Records by operation type GET /history/category/{category} → Records by measurement category GET /history/errors → Error audit trail GET /count/{opType} → Successful operation count

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.QuantityMeasurementController.Compare(QuantityMeasurementModel.Dto.QuantityInputDTO)
M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.QuantityMeasurementController.Convert(QuantityMeasurementModel.Dto.ConvertRequestDTO)
member.summary: Convert a quantity to a different unit within the same category.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.QuantityMeasurementController.Add(QuantityMeasurementModel.Dto.QuantityInputDTO)
member.summary: Add two quantities. Result expressed in first operand's unit.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.QuantityMeasurementController.Subtract(QuantityMeasurementModel.Dto.QuantityInputDTO)
member.summary: Subtract second quantity from first. Result in first operand's unit.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.QuantityMeasurementController.Divide(QuantityMeasurementModel.Dto.QuantityInputDTO)
member.summary: Divide first by second. Returns a dimensionless ratio (SCALAR).

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.QuantityMeasurementController.GetHistoryByOperation(System.String)
member.summary: Get all records for a given operation type (COMPARE/CONVERT/ADD/SUBTRACT/DIVIDE).

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.QuantityMeasurementController.GetHistoryByCategory(System.String)
member.summary: Get all records for a given measurement category (LENGTH/WEIGHT/VOLUME/TEMPERATURE).

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.QuantityMeasurementController.GetErrorHistory
member.summary: Get all records that resulted in errors (audit trail).

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.QuantityMeasurementController.GetOperationCount(System.String)
member.summary: Get successful operation count for a given operation type.

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.UserController
member.summary: UC17: User authentication REST controller. POST /api/v1/users/signup → Register (no token needed) POST /api/v1/users/login → Authenticate, receive JWT (no token needed) GET /api/v1/users/profile → View own profile (JWT required)

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.UserController.Signup(QuantityMeasurementModel.Dto.SignupRequestDTO)
member.remarks:
Password: min 8 chars, must include uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character. Stored as BCrypt hash (work factor 12) — never plain text.
POST /api/v1/users/signup { "username": "john_doe", "email": "john@example.com", "password": "SecureP@ss1" }

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApi.Controller.UserController.Login(QuantityMeasurementModel.Dto.LoginRequestDTO)
member.summary: Login and receive a JWT Bearer token.

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApi.Interface.IQuantityMeasurementApi
member.summary: UC17: Marker interface for the Web API application entry point.

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApi.Middleware.GlobalExceptionMiddleware
member.summary:
UC17: Centralized exception handling middleware. Registered first in Program.cs — wraps every controller and middleware beneath it. Converts all unhandled exceptions into structured JSON ErrorResponseDTO.
Mapping: QuantityMeasurementException → 400 Bad Request AuthException (401/403/409) → corresponding status NotFoundException → 404 Not Found DivideByZeroException → 400 Bad Request Everything else → 500 Internal Server Error

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApi.Middleware.JwtMiddleware
member.summary: UC17: JWT extraction middleware. Reads Bearer token from Authorization header, validates it via IJwtService, then populates HttpContext.User so [Authorize] and User.FindFirstValue() work.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
